passive.name: Berserker Rage
passive.description: Olaf gains Attack Speed and Life Steal based on his missing Health.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Olaf}} gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} and {{sti|life steal}} based on {{as|his '''missing''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Olaf''' gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} and {{stil|life steal}} based on {{as|his '''missing''' health}}, up to {{as|{{pp|50+(50/17)*(x-1)*(0.7025+0.0175*(x-1))|key=%}} '''bonus''' attack speed}} and {{pp|8+(17/17)*(x-1)*(0.7025+0.0175*(x-1))|key=%}} life steal at {{as|70% '''missing''' health}}.

Q.name: Undertow
Q.description: Olaf throws an axe into the ground at a target location, dealing damage to enemies it passes through and reducing their Armor and Move Speed. If Olaf picks up the axe, the ability's cooldown is reset.
Q.tooltip:
Olaf throws an axe, dealing {{ totaldamage }} physical damage and Slowing by {{ slowamount*100 }}% for up to {{ e3 }} seconds (based on distance travelled). Champions hit lose {{ shredamount*100 }}% Armor for {{ debuffduration }} seconds.

If Olaf picks up the axe, this Ability's Cooldown is reduced to {{ tooltipcdrefund }} seconds, or fully refunded if {{ tooltipcdrefund }} seconds has elapsed.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Olaf}} throws an axe to the target location that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies it passes through, briefly {{tip|slow|slowing}} them based on distance travelled. Enemy {{tip|champions}} hit also have {{sti|armor penetration|{{as|reduced armor}}}} for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.blurb2: The axe remains in place during the cooldown, and '''Olaf''' can pick up the axe to reduce the {{sti|cd|'''total''' cooldown}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Olaf''' throws an axe to the target location that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies it passes through and {{tip|slows}} them for {{pp|type=distance traveled|1.5 to 2.5 for 9|400 to 1000|formula=1.5+(0.125 per 75 units traveled)}} seconds. Enemy {{tip|champions}} hit are also inflicted with {{sti|armor penetration|{{as|20% armor reduction}}}} for 4 seconds.
wiki_detail.leveling2: {{st|Monster Bonus Physical Damage|{{ap|10 to 70}}|Total Monster Damage|{{ap|60+10 to 260+70}} {{as|(+ 100% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description3: The axe remains in place for a duration equal to ''Undertow's'' cooldown, briefly granting {{tip|sight}} of its surroundings. '''Olaf''' can pick up the axe to reduce ''Undertow's'' {{sti|'''current''' cooldown}} to {{tt|{{fd|2.5}} seconds|Affected by ability haste}}, which resets the cooldown if that has already elapsed.
wiki_detail.description4: ''Undertow will cast at max range if cast beyond that. Nearby monsters are granted {{tip|ghosting}} upon Undertow's cast.''
wiki_detail.target range: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|425|Minimum missile range, estimated}} / {{tt|1000|Maximum missile range}}
wiki_detail.effect radius: {{tip|cr|icononly = true}} {{tt|100|Impact additional radius}} / {{tt|250|Axe retrieval radius}} / {{tt|300|Axe landing brief sight radius}}
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Undertow'' may hit additional targets upon landing, but not targets already struck in-flight.
** The axe will land approximately 50 units further than ''Undertow's'' target range if cast below maximum range.
* The axe is stopped prematurely upon encountering {{ai|Wind Wall|Yasuo}} or {{ai|Unbreakable|Braum}}, remaining on the ground upon collision.
* The timer for how long an axe stays on the ground does not begin until it has landed, thus it is possible to throw another axe before retrieving the first.
* '''Olaf''' cannot pick up an enemy '''Olaf's''' axe on the ground.
{{Effect at cast time start}}

W.name: Tough It Out
W.description: Olaf's Attack Speed is increased and he gains a Shield.
W.tooltip: Olaf gains {{ attackspeed*100 }}% Attack Speed for {{ duration }} seconds, and {{ baseshield }} plus {{ shieldpercmissinghp*100 }}% missing Health Shield (up to a maximum of {{ maxshieldcalc }} Shield below {{ thresholdformax*100 }}% Health) for {{ shieldduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Olaf}} gains tremendous {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack speed}}}} for a few seconds, and {{tip|shield|shields}} himself based on {{as|his '''missing''' health}} for a short time.
wiki_detail.description2: He also grants himself a {{tip|shield}} for {{fd|2.5}} seconds with an amount that is capped at {{as|70% '''missing''' health}}.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Tough It Out {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Olaf's''' basic attack timer.''

E.name: Reckless Swing
E.description: Olaf attacks with such force that it deals true damage to his target and himself, refunding the Health cost if he destroys the target.
E.tooltip:
Olaf ferociously swings his axes, dealing {{ totaldamage }} true damage. If the enemy dies, the cost is refunded.

Attacks lower the Cooldown of this Ability by 1 second, increased to 2 seconds when attacking monsters.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Olaf}} consumes {{as|{{sti|health}}}} to strike thunder onto the target enemy, dealing {{as|true damage}}. If this kills the target, '''Olaf''' {{tip|heal|heals}} the {{sti|health|{{as|health cost}}}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Olaf''' strikes thunder onto the target enemy, dealing {{sti|{{as|true damage}}}}.
wiki_detail.description2: If ''Reckless Swing'' kills the target, '''Olaf''' {{tip|heals}} himself equal to the {{as|{{sti|health|health cost}}}}.
wiki_detail.description3: Basic attacks reduce ''Reckless Swing's'' {{sti|cooldown}} by 1 second, increased to 2 against monsters.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The health cost is equal to 30% of the '''total''' damage dealt by the ability.
* ''Reckless Swing'' can be cast even if '''Olaf''' doesn't have the sufficient amount of health to pay for the health cost.
** As with all abilities with health costs, ''Reckless Swing'' will not reduce '''Olaf's''' health below {{as|1|hp}}.
* ''Reckless Swing's'' health refund is considered a {{tip|heal}} therefore it is affected by healing modifiers.
{{Unit-targeted cancel conditions}}

R.name: Ragnarok
R.description: Olaf passively gains increased armor and magic resist. He can activate this ability to become immune to disables for as long as he keeps attacking.

wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Olaf''' becomes enraged for a short time, {{tip|cleanse|cleansing}} himself and becoming {{tip|cc-immune}}, as well as gaining {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}}}} and increased [[size]]. For a brief moment, he gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} while facing nearby enemy {{tip|champions}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: ''Ragnarok's'' duration can be extended by hitting [[basic attack]]s and ''{{ai|Reckless Swing|Olaf}}'' against an enemy {{tip|champion}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{tip|cc-immune|Cc-immunity|nolink=true}}}}: {{tip|Crowd control}} cannot be applied during this time.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Olaf''' becomes enraged for 3 seconds, {{tip|cleanse|cleansing}} himself of all {{tip|crowd control}} and becoming {{tip|Cc-immune|immune to them}}, as well as gaining {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}}}} and 10% increased [[size]]. For the first second of ''Ragnarok'', he also gains {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} while facing {{tip|sight|visible}} enemy {{tip|champions}} within 2000 units.
wiki_detail.leveling2:
{{st|Bonus Attack Damage|{{ap|10 to 30}} {{as|(+ 25% AD)}}}}
{{st|Bonus Movement Speed|{{ap|20|45|70}}%}}
wiki_detail.description3: ''Ragnarok's'' duration is increased by and up to {{fd|2.5}} seconds for each basic attack {{tip|on-hit}} or cast of ''{{ai|Reckless Swing|Olaf}}'' against an enemy {{tip|champion}}.
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Ragnarok'' removes the underlying {{tip|stun}} from {{tip|airborne}} effects, but not the forced displacement, which requires him to use a {{tip|blink}} or {{tip|dash}} ability to override it.
* ''Ragnarok'' does not bypass self or ally applied effects, unless otherwise stated. Some examples include {{ii|Zhonya's Hourglass}}, {{ii|Guardian Angel}}, and {{ai|Fate's Call|Kalista}}.
** He prevents both ally and enemy {{ci|Bard}} from putting him in {{tip|stasis}} with {{ai|Tempered Fate|Bard}}.
** The ability will remain for its full duration regardless.
* ''Ragnarok'' does not negate any [[debuff]]s other than {{tip|crowd control}} from being applied unless absolutely necessary.
* The {{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}} updates dynamically over the duration; Increases or reductions in {{as|attack damage}} after the effect has been applied will still be amplified.
* The {{as|25% attack damage}} scaling amplifies the flat {{as|attack damage '''bonus'''}} as well.
* ''Ragnarok'' will not expire during {{ais|Reckless Swing|Olaf}} cast time.
* ''Ragnarok'' will not resist the displacement caused by the 10 additional {{ui|Blast Cone|Blast Cones}} spawned by {{ui|Infernal Drake|Infernal Rift}} if they're triggered by '''Olaf'''.{{bug|1}}<!-- Olaf will dash upon triggering the blast cone, haven't tested interaction with enemies triggering it -->
* ''Ragnarok's'' duration will not be increased if the basic attack is {{tip|dodged}}.
* ''Ragnarok's'' duration will be increased if the basic attack is {{tip|blocked}}.
_comments: Olaf will dash upon triggering the blast cone, haven't tested interaction with enemies triggering it
